data.body:
### [1/10] HEADER — Tickets-repo unbounded growth: reconciler .bridge_state deep-dive (TABLED)

PROBLEM: The rebar tickets git store (.tickets-tracker, `tickets` branch) grows UNBOUNDEDLY. ~443 MB / ~178k objects for ~15k tickets; ~85% is the reconciler's `.bridge_state/` Jira-sync cache. Goal: bound the growth without breaking the reconciler, cross-clone union-merge sync, or the identity/attestation trust model.

STATUS: **TABLED.** This is a sensitive reconciler-CORE change (touches direction arbitration + the differ field contract). We deep-dived the WHY of the current design (Chesterton's fence) and are deferring implementation. THIS session_log = the comprehensive raw record; IDEA <linked below> = the summary + resume pointer.

RESUME MAP:
- Prior session log b96a-15a5-1c0a-47c5 (closein-vermillion-azurevase): earlier measured facts + the cited growth prior-art research report (git-annex forget / crates.io / Homebrew).
- Umbrella: ticket 1270-b740 (Jira reconciler deep-dive). Convergence history: epics 3006-e198 (Level-triggered bridge convergence), 6c9c-811f (dust-troth-naval / conflict-free reconciler state), 97e7-cf42 (minor-haste-ogle / union+gc). ADRs 0004, 0026-0029, 0031.
- ACTIVE OTHER SESSION: epic 58b0-104b (Jira reconciler: silent comment + inbound-link SYNC-CORRECTNESS) — orthogonal to SIZE, but shares the differ/field contract, so COORDINATE on any snapshot/baseline change.
- OUT OF SCOPE: gc-corruption fix (bug 88eb, "ADR 0051", Gerrit 774 — LANDED); verify-identity scan cost (another session).

ENTRIES BELOW: [2] measured facts; [3] prev_snapshot NOT redundant (correction); [4] prev narrowing lever + THE OPEN GATE; [5] bindings.json growth + levers; [6] DOSSIER A snapshot substrate WHY; [7] DOSSIER B baseline lineage WHY + digest risk; [8] DOSSIER C binding lifecycle/identity WHY; [9] DOSSIER D coordination/storage WHY + reclaim flag-day; [10] decisions + recommended plan + open gates.
